---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that does not work as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## How to reproduce

The exact command you ran, for example:

```
bcicards benchmark --dataset BNCI2014_001 --subjects 1
```

## Expected result

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version:
- Package version (`bcicards --version`):
- Installed extras (`[test]` only, or `[bci]`):

## Extra context

Logs, screenshots, or the generated card/JSON if relevant.
